videos.title: Kya Kamaal Hai - Glimpse | Main Vaapas Aaunga | Diljit Dosanjh | A.R. Rahman | Imtiaz Ali
videos.description:
Two years ago, THEY created magic with Amar Singh Chamkila!!

This Baisakhi, A.R. Rahman, Diljit Dosanjh, Imtiaz Ali and Irshad Kamil come together for what promises to be another chartbuster from their upcoming film, Main Vaapas Aaunga.

Kya Kamaal Hai, is a ‘song of hope’ amidst all the noise that surrounds us today. It draws its inspiration from the love that refused to fade away when everything else was lost during the partition era.

Here’s a glimpse into its making. 🎶 Kya Kamaal Hai...Song
